name: Background Job Detection — Suppress Block
goal: Prevent workers monitoring long-running pipelines from getting blocked in re-check loops

tasks.name: Add bg-detection preamble to get-back-to-work hook
tasks.description: Insert background job detection block inside the elif branch at line 290 to approve stops when run_in_background=true is found in recent turns. Fail-open: transcript missing or jq failure falls through to existing block_stop.

steps.description: Edit get-back-to-work-claude.sh — insert detection preamble before increment_block_counter in the elif IN_PROGRESS_OR_PENDING_COUNT branch

tasks.name: Add monitoring-pattern test case to test-bg-detection.sh
tasks.description: Add Fixture 6 (monitoring pattern: bg job launched then monitoring turns) and new assert_eq under Core Detection. Run full suite — all 8 tests must pass.

steps.description: Add Fixture 6 definition after Fixture 5's EOF line
Add monitoring-pattern assertion after the stale_bg assertion

tasks.name: Commit repo changes and deploy installed hook
tasks.description: Stage plan files, commit all changes, copy updated hook to ~/.claude/ironclaude-hooks/, verify installed copy matches repo.

steps.command: git commit -m 'feat(hooks): suppress get-back-to-work block when worker has active background shell'

steps.description: Copy updated hook to installed path
